description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named s3fs-fuse CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a scheduled cron job every Sunday. The workflow has two jobs: Linux and macos10. The Linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a build matrix for various containers, installing packages, checking out the source code, building, running cppcheck, and testing the suite. The macos10 job runs on a macos-10.15 environment, installing osxfuse, brew packages, awscli, and then building and testing the suite.
